Multi-Agent

Knowledge Base

REST API

HTTP interface for remote access and service integration.

Starting the Server

python -m mnemosyne.server   --host 0.0.0.0   --port 8080   --db-path ./memory.db

Or via Docker:

docker run -p 8080:8080   -v $(pwd)/memory.db:/data/memory.db   mnemosyne/server:latest

Authentication

All endpoints require an API key via the X-API-Key header:

curl -H "X-API-Key: your-key" http://localhost:8080/health

Configure keys via environment variable:

export MNEMOSYNE_API_KEYS=key1,key2,key3

Endpoints

Health Check

GET /health

# Response:
{
"status": "healthy",
"version": "2.0.0",
"db_connected": true,
"working_count": 42,
"episodic_count": 128,
}

Remember

POST /remember
Content-Type: application/json

{
"content": "User prefers dark mode.",
"tags": ["preferences", "ui"],
"importance": 0.8,
"source": "conversation"
}

# Response:
{
"id": "mem_abc123",
"status": "stored"
}

Recall

POST /recall
Content-Type: application/json

{
"query": "user preferences",
"top_k": 5,
"tags": ["preferences"]
}

# Response:
{
"results": [
  {
    "id": "mem_abc123",
    "content": "User prefers dark mode.",
    "score": 0.95,
    "tags": ["preferences", "ui"]
  }
],
"total": 1
}

Get Memory

GET /memory/{id}

# Response:
{
"id": "mem_abc123",
"content": "User prefers dark mode.",
"tags": ["preferences", "ui"],
"importance": 0.8,
"created_at": "2026-04-25T14:30:00Z"
}

Update Memory

PUT /memory/{id}
Content-Type: application/json

{
"content": "User prefers dark mode and large fonts.",
"importance": 0.9
}

Delete Memory

DELETE /memory/{id}

# Response: 204 No Content

Add Fact

POST /facts
Content-Type: application/json

{
"subject": "Alice",
"predicate": "prefers_language",
"object": "Go",
"confidence": 0.95
}

# Response:
{
"id": "fact_xyz789",
"status": "stored"
}

Query Facts

GET /facts?subject=Alice&current_only=true

# Response:
{
"facts": [
  {
    "id": "fact_xyz789",
    "subject": "Alice",
    "predicate": "prefers_language",
    "object": "Go",
    "confidence": 0.95
  }
]
}

Statistics

GET /stats

# Response:
{
"working_count": 42,
"episodic_count": 128,
"semantic_count": 64,
"db_size_mb": 12.5,
"last_sleep_at": "2026-04-25T13:00:00Z"
}

Error Responses

StatusCodeDescription
400INVALID_REQUESTMalformed request body
401UNAUTHORIZEDMissing or invalid API key
404NOT_FOUNDMemory or fact not found
429RATE_LIMITEDToo many requests
500INTERNAL_ERRORServer error

OpenAPI Spec

The server exposes OpenAPI documentation at:

  • Swagger UI: http://localhost:8080/docs
  • ReDoc: http://localhost:8080/redoc
  • OpenAPI JSON: http://localhost:8080/openapi.json
CORS

The REST server enables CORS by default for all origins in development. In production, configure allowed origins via MNEMOSYNE_CORS_ORIGINS.

© 2026 Mnemosyne. Built by Abdias Moya.
